# International Panel Shop (IPS) | Promotions & Marketing Hub

> The Western Cape's authority in industrial auto body restoration and digital asset protection.

## Core Services
- **Factory-Grade Repairs:** 20+ years expertise in structural repairs and spray painting.
- **Sure Drive Ecosystem:** Digital asset protection using SureBucks (pre-paid repair tokens).
- **Service Logistics:** Free Uber-based collection and drop-off for repairs exceeding R10,000 (Cape Town).
- **AI Assessments:** Integration with Aurora AI for instant digital damage evaluation.

## Financial Infrastructure
- **PayFast Gateway:** 100% digital, paperless payment links.
- **Credit Options:** Integrated support for Mobicred and RCS via PayFast.
- **No Physical Card Machines:** All transactions are processed through secure digital links.

## Trust Signals
- **Rating:** 4.8/5 Google Rating.
- **Volume:** 213+ verified satisfied customers.
- **Location:** 7 Bloem Street, Goodwood, Cape Town.

## Key Links
- [Main Website](https://www.intpanelshop.co.za)
- [Finance & Credit Page](https://promo.intpanelshop.co.za/Get_Credit.html)
- [Sure Drive Platform](https://sure-drive-9a8c9.web.app/)
- [AI Quote Tool](https://www.aurora-repair.com)
